comments.body:
LGTM, but it woulda been nice to attach to the restarted container and cat test.txt one more time.

Did you sign this commit?  I'm not seeing it in the description.
Commit should be signed, yeah. Good call about the attach/cat, but it took the better part of an hour to do it without major typos, so I'll save that bit for later

:pushpin: Commit cc18989 has been approved by `rhatdan`
